title: BACARDÍ Limón Rum | Lemon Rum | Lemon Flavoured Rum | BACARDÍ Global
clean_text: BACARDÍ Limón Rum | Lemon Rum | Lemon Flavoured Rum | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BACARDÍ TROPICAL BACARDÍ LIMÓN BACARDÍ PASSIONFRUIT BACARDÍ LIME BACARDÍ COCONUT BACARDÍ DRAGONBERRY BACARDÍ RASPBERRY BACARDÍ MANGO CHILE FLAVOUR RANGE LIMÓN We named BACARDÍ Limón rum after the Spanish word for lemon. But it gets its fresh flavour from a blend of three citrus fruits; lemon, lime and grapefruit. So what does it taste like? Sunshine! BACARDÍ LIMÓN RUM MIXES PERFECTLY WITH LEMONADE TO MAKE OUR SIGNATURE BACARDÍ LIMÓNADE. BACARDÍ COCKTAILS PACKED WITH FRUIT Make simple cocktails that pack a punch. From sweet coconut to crisp raspberry, discover new recipes made with our flavoured rums. VIEW ALL COCKTAILS Limonade Raspberry Mojito Lime Cooler COCONUT RUM & PINEAPPLE JUICE Rum Rita Drag to discover more VIEW ALL COCKTAILS SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou OUR RECOMMENDED RUMS LIKE THIS? TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW RUMS BACARDÍ Limon & Lemonade BACARDÍ Lime & Soda BACARDÍ LIME BACARDÍ Coconut BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA VIEW RUMS MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? WHAT CAN YOU MIX FLAVORED RUM WITH? Flavored rum gives your taste buds an extra element of surprise. You can mix flavored rum with a wide range of mixers, from simple cola to refreshing lemonade. IS FLAVORED RUM SWEET? Flavored, fruity rums come in a range of tasting experiences, from soft and sweet to sour and tangy. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? We make rum by distilling sugarcane molasses and fermenting it with yeast and water. Rum originates from Barbados with its roots going back as far as the 17th century. metadata.description: With three crisp, citrus flavors, BACARDÍ Limón flavored rum glistens like sunshine in your glass. Discover BACARDÍ flavoured rum range and explore exciting new cocktails
